---
title: 'Mesorasi: Architecture Support for Point Cloud Analytics via Delayed-Aggregation'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Boyuan Tian
- Tiancheng Xu
- Paul Whatmough
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/micro20-mesorasi.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/mesorasi-architecture-support-for-point-cloud-analytics-via-delayed-aggregation
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/Efficient-Deep-Learning-for-Point-Clouds
journ: MICRO
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 45
---
